semantic_description: The function scans a null-terminated character array represented by logical list l followed by 0. It returns 0 for the empty string, otherwise advances i until s[i + 1] is the terminator, then compares the last nonzero character l[n - 1] with c and returns 1 exactly when they are equal. The loop is an unbounded while(1) scan with an internal break at the terminator; the function only reads the string memory and preserves the CharArray resource.
